testcase.name: saucedemoTest

error.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"*[data-test="checkout"]"} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '15.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [e279746396aeb5c2f303773536e730de, findElement {value=*[data-test="checkout"], using=css selector}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\LILIAN~1.NAS\AppDa...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51867}, goog:processID: 29156, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51867/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: e279746396aeb5c2f303773536e730de
